series_metadata.series_title: Wire Requests from Economic Development department
series_metadata.series_description: Wire request sheets are prepared by Economic Development staff and submitted to the Investments and Trust department. These forms authorize the purchase of a financial instrument from the bank that is providing the linked-deposit loan to an Economic Development program participating bank. Documentation includes position requests, wire sheets, and collateral sufficiency analysis.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: later of (a) conclusion of fiscal year in which corresponding wire was requested, an additional 2 fiscal years, or (b) annual audit of Treasurer corresponding fiscal year by Auditor of State is complete and final audit report has been published
